steps.title: Close the dash interruption
steps.content: The dash after drastically opens an inserted phrase about how many cores microchips can now have. The blank must close that interruption after thousands and then continue the result clause with that.

steps.title: Keep the result clause intact
steps.content: Choice A uses a comma that does not match the dash, Choice B puts the dash after that, and Choice D ends the sentence before the result clause. A closing dash before that fits. The answer is C.
